message:
fix(node): saturating arithmetic and panic hardening across 66 modules

Systematic defensive hardening sweep addressing two classes of issues:

1. INTEGER OVERFLOW PREVENTION (60+ files):
   Replace bare + 1, += 1, and arithmetic on counters/sequences with
   saturating_add(1) and saturating_sub(1). These counters are
   incremented by external events and could theoretically overflow
   in long-running nodes. Affected subsystems:
   - connector: bocpd, cancellation_protocol, claim_compiler,
     diagnostic_registry, ecosystem_registry/reputation, fencing,
     high_assurance_promotion, lease_service, obligation_tracker,
     offline_coverage, policy_checkpoint, quarantine_store,
     rollout_state, saga, snapshot_policy, supervision, trust_fabric
   - control_plane: control_lane_mapping/policy, divergence_gate,
     fork_detection, key_role_separation
   - observability: evidence_ledger
   - policy: approval_workflow, bayesian_diagnostics,
     controller_boundary_checks, hardening_auto_trigger,
     integrity_sweep_scheduler
   - registry: staking_governance
   - remote: eviction_saga, idempotency_store, virtual_transport_faults
   - replay: time_travel_engine
   - runtime: anti_entropy, hardware_planner, lane_scheduler,
     time_travel
   - security: adversary_graph, challenge_flow, copilot_engine,
     dgis/barrier_primitives, impossible_default, interface_hash,
     isolation_rail_router, lineage_tracker, quarantine_controller,
     staking_governance, vef_degraded_mode
   - storage: frankensqlite_adapter, retrievability_gate
   - supply_chain: category_shift, certification, ecosystem_telemetry,
     extension_registry, quarantine, reputation
   - testing: lab_runtime, virtual_transport
   - tools: counterfactual_replay, evidence_replay_validator,
     partner_lighthouse_programs, trust_economics_dashboard,
     verifier_benchmark_releases
   - vef: control_integration, verification_state
   - api: middleware, session_auth

2. PANIC HARDENING (15+ files):
   Replace bare panic!() in test match arms with assert!(false, ...)
   including the unexpected value for diagnostics. Replace .expect()
   with proper error handling via Ok/Err returns. Add resource cleanup
   (drop guard before process::exit). Files include: lifecycle,
   n_version_oracle, policy_checkpoint, rollout_state, fork_detection,
   hardening_state_machine, idempotency_store, lockstep_harness,
   nversion_oracle, safe_mode, zk_attestation, counterfactual_replay,
   key_role_separation, saga, engine_dispatcher, retrievability_gate

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
